title: habenaria filicornis
intro: Habenaria filicornis, also known as the Horned Habenaria or the Horned Orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues, including fever, cough, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Habenaria filicornis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, skin irritations, and wounds. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or an infusion, where the roots or leaves are boiled in water to create a herbal remedy that is consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
